tasks.label: Copy packs to Minecraft dev folder
args: $bpDest = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Packages\Microsoft.MinecraftUWP_8wekyb3d8bbwe\LocalState\games\com.mojang\development_behavior_packs\VillageCraft-behavior'; $rpDest = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Packages\Microsoft.MinecraftUWP_8wekyb3d8bbwe\LocalState\games\com.mojang\development_resource_packs\VillageCraft-resource'; if (Test-Path $bpDest) { Remove-Item $bpDest -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path $rpDest) { Remove-Item $rpDest -Recurse -Force }; Copy-Item (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'behavior_pack') $bpDest -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'resource_pack') $rpDest -Recurse -Force

tasks.label: Prepare Minecraft Debugging
dependsOn: Copy packs to Minecraft dev folder

tasks.label: Build VillageCraft.mcaddon
args: import zipfile, os; def zipdir(p, z): [z.write(os.path.join(r, f), os.path.relpath(os.path.join(r, f), os.path.join(p, '..'))) for r, d, fs in os.walk(p) for f in fs]; z=zipfile.ZipFile('VillageCraft.mcaddon', 'w', zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED); zipdir('behavior_pack', z); zipdir('resource_pack', z); z.close()
